name: Butter Crisps
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Unsalted butter at room temperature
Colored sugar crystals or Plain pearl sugar crystals
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 35 minutes Chilling time: 1 hour Baking time: 10 minutes
1. Combine butter, sugar, egg yolks, lemon rind, lemon juice, cherry liqueur, and salt in a large mixing bowl. Stir in the flour. Form into a ball, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate for 1 hour.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Roll dough at 1/8-inch thickness on a lightly floured cloth-covered board. Cut into desired shapes. Place on greased baking sheets and sprinkle with sugar crystals.
3. Bake for 10 minutes (cookies should not brown). Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks.
Recipe from Debbie Vanni of Libertyville, Illinois. From the Chicago Tribune annual Food Guide Holiday Cookie Contest December 4, 1986
